text:
00 = Normal vision; sees adequately in most situations; can see medication labels, newsprint.
01 = Partially impaired: cannot see medication labels or newsprint, but can see obstacles in path, and the surrounding layout; can count fingers at arm's length.
02 = Severely impaired; cannot locate object without hearing or touching
them or patient nonresponsive. CHAR 2 x x x x x
M1210_HEARG_ABLTY M1210 Ability To Hear This field indicates the patient's ability to hear. 00 = Adequate: hears normal
